objective: A/B retest PM regime-target exposure v2 with deployment discipline in rebound window.

variables.custom: Only PM_EXPERIMENT_MODE changes to regime_target_exposure. PM now must reallocate blocked core-budget to next-ranked candidates and explain exact blockers if below target exposure.

fixed_indicators.description: Fixed trend snapshot: close, SMA20/SMA60, MACD, RSI14.
Fixed momentum/risk snapshot: 5d/10d/20d returns and 20d volatility.
